# TelePlus Care

> TelePlus Care is a virtual healthcare clinic based in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada, providing telehealth and in-person medical services across the province of Alberta and parts of Saskatchewan.

## About

TelePlus Care offers convenient, accessible virtual healthcare from licensed Alberta physicians and healthcare providers. Founded to eliminate barriers to medical care, the clinic serves over 10,000 patients with an average wait time of 3-4 minutes and a 4.9-star patient rating.

- **Type:** Medical Clinic (Virtual + Physical)
- **Location:** 17803 65 St NW, Edmonton, AB T5Z 3K6, Canada
- **Phone:** 587-442-4898
- **Toll-Free:** 1-888-462-2755
- **Hours:** Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM, Sat 10AM-4PM
- **Booking:** https://telepluscare.com/book-appointment-alberta/

## Services

- [General Health](https://telepluscare.com/general-health/): Primary care, infections, allergies, chronic illness management
- [Weight Loss Programs](https://telepluscare.com/weight-loss/): Medical evaluation, GLP-1 medications, dietary counselling
- [Diabetes & Chronic Disease](https://telepluscare.com/diabetes-chronic-disease/): Diabetes management, lifestyle modifications, monitoring
- [Mental Health](https://telepluscare.com/mental-health/): Therapy, counselling, ADHD, anxiety, depression treatment
- [Women's Health](https://telepluscare.com/womens-health/): Reproductive health, birth control, hormone management
- [Men's Health](https://telepluscare.com/mens-health/): Prostate health, testosterone, hormone management
- [Skin Conditions](https://telepluscare.com/skin-conditions/): Acne, eczema, psoriasis, dermatology
- [Aesthetic Services](https://telepluscare.com/aesthetic/): Botox, PRP, dermal fillers, skin rejuvenation
- [Prescription Refills](https://telepluscare.com/prescription-refill/): Same-day prescription renewals across Alberta
- [Doctor's Notes](https://telepluscare.com/online-doctors-notes-in-edmonton/): Sick notes, medical certificates
- [UTI Treatment](https://telepluscare.com/uti-appointment-in-alberta/): Same-day UTI diagnosis and prescriptions
- [Driving Medical Exams](https://telepluscare.com/driving-medical-examination-appointment-in-edmonton/): Class 1-5 driving medical assessments

## Service Areas

TelePlus Care serves patients across Alberta including Edmonton, Calgary, Red Deer, Lethbridge, Fort McMurray, Airdrie, St. Albert, Sherwood Park, Medicine Hat, Grande Prairie, Leduc, and Spruce Grove. Virtual consultations available province-wide.

- [All Locations](https://telepluscare.com/location/)

## Key Differentiators

- 3-4 minute average wait time
- 10,000+ patients served
- 4.9-star patient rating
- Same-day appointments available
- No referral needed
- Alberta Health covered services
- Licensed Alberta physicians (CPSA registered)
- PIPEDA and HIA compliant
